title: Manufacturing Engineer - Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd!
